blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,078 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
